The '''''Lost Hope''''' was an old, barely-functioning [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with two sublight engines.<ref name="DTII:R" />

==Characteristics==
The freighter design was based on the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class LH-3210 cargo freighter]], but was much smaller.<ref name="SR" />
The freighter itself was so rusty and degraded by 25 ABY, it had large, red spots covering its hull.<ref name="SR" />

==History==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it was used to ferry a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] crew on the [[Best Chance (shuttle)|''Best Chance'']] from the ''[[Ralroost]]'' to [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] prior to the [[Battle of Garqi|battle]] which took place there.<ref name="DTII:R" />

{{Ship-stub}}
